case_title: FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP. VS. YVONNE HYATT et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP.
